title: spergularia colorata var. crassipes
intro: Spergularia colorata var. crassipes is a variant of the sand-spurrey plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Spergularia colorata var. crassipes include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reduce fever, and act as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its leaves and stems, which can be used to create teas, infusions, or tinctures.
